app.title: Ben's Ceremony Editor
app.subtitle: Edit audio, video, and images for your ceremony

input.uploadDesc: Drag & drop an MP3, MP4, or image file here, or click to browse
input.invalidFile: Please upload an MP3, MP4, or image file

image.unsupportedFormat: Only PNG, JPEG, and WebP images are supported
image.title: Image editor
image.instructions: Drag to reposition. Scroll to zoom.

youtubeThumb.title: Download YouTube thumbnail
youtubeThumb.subtitle: Paste a YouTube URL to save its thumbnail at the highest available resolution.
youtubeThumb.invalidUrl: That doesn't look like a valid YouTube URL.
youtubeThumb.error: Could not fetch the thumbnail. Check the URL and your connection.

project.audioOnly: Audio projects only accept MP3 files
project.videoOnly: Video projects only accept MP4 files
project.discardConfirm: Discard this project and start over?
project.sizeWarning: This project is large. Export may be slow or may run out of memory.

export.clipFailed: A clip failed to process — try replacing it
export.tooLarge: Project too large — try shorter clips or fewer of them
